
### condition codes and OOO 


* need to handle reading condition codes in OOO processor
* option 1: rename like a normal register
* option 2: handle in reorder buffer


### renaming and condition codes 

<!-- \lstset{language=myasm,style=small} -->
   

::: {.r-stack}
![](/ooo/texfig/pushqOption1.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/ooo/texfig/pushqOption1.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}


:::
